Added scraper/.env DATABASE_URL (Supavisor pooler, aws-0-eu-central-1, port 6543 — direct db.*.supabase.co host is IPv6-only and unreachable from this sandbox) so future schema migrations can run via psycopg2 instead of manual SQL Editor pastes
